rows.label: qev040404_MSG0001
rows.name:
Satsuuu! Where are you-mo!
Gotsu is starting to feel heartbroken-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040404_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him that Satsu has been found.

rows.label: qev040404_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that Satsu has become a star in the sky.

rows.label: qev040404_MSG0002
rows.name: Thank goodness-mo. Now I can return to everyone-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040404_MSG0003
rows.name:
I was so, so heartbroken
that I thought I was going to lose it-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040404_MSG0004
rows.name: Well then, I'm going to hurry back-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040404_MSG0005
rows.name:
S-shocking-mo...
My heartbreak is going to explode-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040404_MSG0006
rows.name:
I can never see Satsu again-mo.
It's heartbreaking-mo... So very heartbreaking-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040404_MSG0007
rows.name:
...You were teasing?
Satsu has returned to the caravan?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040404_MSG0008
rows.name:
You're a meanie-mo. I was tricked-mo.
But I'm happy Satsu is alive-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040404_MSG0009
rows.name: I'm going to hurry back and see Satsu and the others-mo![ST:wait ]
